findings.name: UDM Subscriber Enumeration
findings.evidence: UDM returned subscriber profile for imsi-208930000000001 to rogue AMF
findings.conclusion: UDM does not verify that the requesting AMF is actually serving this subscriber. Any NF with a valid token can extract any subscriber's profile. Full subscriber database extractable by iterating SUPIs.

headers.Authorization: Bearer <rogue AMF token scoped for nudm-sdm>
